name: asr-models
body:
This release contains pre-trained ASR models.

Please refer to
https://k2-fsa.github.io/sherpa/onnx/pretrained_models/index.html
for more models.


ASR models for qnn can be found at
https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/tag/asr-models-qnn

ASR models for Ascend NPU can be found at
https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/tag/asr-models-ascend
